tools.name: eat_food
tools.description: Eat a food item to reduce hunger. Uses inventory first, then buys on the spot.

tools.name: buy_item
tools.description: Buy an item. Housing moves you in. Services are consumed immediately.

tools.name: work_job
tools.description: Perform work to earn money. Location-bound jobs require proximity.

tools.name: seek_medicalcare
tools.description: Visit the Hospital (must be within 150m) to restore health.

tools.name: get_education
tools.description: Study to increase education level and directly boost your hourly wage. Requires proximity to School or Library.

tools.name: walk
tools.description: Walk 30 metres in a cardinal or diagonal direction. Updates your position and nearby location.

tools.name: call_person
tools.description: Call someone by phone — no proximity required.

tools.name: change_status
tools.description: Propose a relationship status (within 30m, e.g. 'married'). Requires target to reciprocate with same parameters to accept. Or update personal belief.

tools.name: buy_stock
tools.description: Buy shares of the village stock at the current market price.

tools.name: sell_stock
tools.description: Sell shares of the village stock at the current market price. Shows realised P&L.
